ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., land-based, sea-based) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization responsible for the station */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather metric */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., rainfall, temperature, wind speed) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_metrics_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "instrumentation_type" TEXT /* Type of instrumentation used at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_metadata_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrumentation" (
  "instrumentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrumentation entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the instrumentation belongs to */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrumentation (e.g., thermometer, barometer) */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrumentation */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrumentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrumentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrumentation_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrumentation_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "instrumentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrumentation the calibration belongs to */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Value of the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrumentation_calibration_instrumentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrumentation_id") REFERENCES instrumentation ("instrumentation_id")
)
